message:
chore: beads flush + fuzz/Cargo.lock expansion from new fuzz target additions

Two lockstep housekeeping items:

- .beads/issues.jsonl: routine br sync --flush-only export refresh
  covering already-tracked beads; no new IDs, just metadata alignment
  from other agents' session activity.

- fuzz/Cargo.lock: regenerates after the fuzz workspace picked up
  several new transitive deps required by the most recent fuzz-target
  additions. +466/-65 lines in the lockfile reflect new entries
  (adler2, allocator-api2, and the remaining downstream deps for the
  fuzz harness crates) plus version alignment across existing entries.
  Lockfile-only change; no Cargo.toml edits, so `cargo check` under
  fuzz/ would regenerate the same state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
